description: Human-approval record for one of the two governance gates. Owner: 1.4.1. Outcome absent is treated as rejection; silence is never consent. Both gates are fail-closed.

confirms.description: Aspects confirmed at this gate. Owner: 1.4.1.

fail_closed.description: Fail-closed guarantee; shall be true. Owner: 1.4.1.

gate.description: Which of the two approval gates this record represents. Owner: 1.4.1.

gates.description: The downstream stage this approval gates. Owner: 1.4.1.

outcome.description: Approval outcome. absent is treated as rejection; silence is never consent. Owner: 1.4.1.

position.description: Position of the gate relative to rendering. Owner: 1.4.1.

title: Approval Record
